skills.name: AV Consultation & Design

skills.name: AV System Integration
skills.description: Complete AV system integration services — professional audio, video walls, projection systems, conferencing solutions, digital signage installation and commissioning.

skills.description: Sound isolation, acoustic treatment, noise control, and room acoustics optimization for auditoriums, studios, conference halls, and commercial spaces.

skills.name: Boardroom & Conference Room AV
skills.description: Complete boardroom AV solutions — video conferencing, presentation systems, audio systems, AV control panels for corporate meeting rooms.

skills.name: Auditorium AV Systems
skills.description: Complete auditorium sound, lighting, video, acoustics, and control systems for large venues, theatres, and performance spaces.
